GeneralComments:
Welcome to the Royal Cape Yacht Club. Set within the Cape Town Port.With views of the Table Mountain on the one side and Yachts gently swaying in the Marina on the other side, you will search far for a more beautiful and unique setting. Phone:+27 (0)21 421 1354 Security on site Restaurant "Tavern on the Seas" Sunday-Tuesday:08h00 - 20h00 Wednesday- Saturday:08h00-22h00
